'''govashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphical|nymphical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphical|nymphical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| govashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:govashithi|govashithi]] || [[word:govashiji|govashiji]] || [[word:govashishi|govashishi]] || [[word:govashiki|govashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:govashuthuthu|govashuthuthu]] || [[word:govashujuju|govashujuju]] || [[word:govashushushu|govashushushu]] || [[word:govashukuku|govashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:govashuthu|govashuthu]] || [[word:govashuju|govashuju]] || [[word:govashushu|govashushu]] || [[word:govashuku|govashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:govashufthuf|govashufthuf]] || [[word:govashufjuf|govashufjuf]] || [[word:govashufshuf|govashufshuf]] || [[word:govashufkuf|govashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:govashethe|govashethe]] || [[word:govasheje|govasheje]] || [[word:govasheshe|govasheshe]] || [[word:govasheke|govasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:govashothotho|govashothotho]] || [[word:govashojojo|govashojojo]] || [[word:govashoshosho|govashoshosho]] || [[word:govashokoko|govashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:govashotho|govashotho]] || [[word:govashojo|govashojo]] || [[word:govashosho|govashosho]] || [[word:govashoko|govashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:govashofthof|govashofthof]] || [[word:govashofjof|govashofjof]] || [[word:govashofshof|govashofshof]] || [[word:govashofkof|govashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:govashïfthïf|govashïfthïf]] || [[word:govashïfjïf|govashïfjïf]] || [[word:govashïfshïf|govashïfshïf]] || [[word:govashïfkïf|govashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:govashïfthïfthïf|govashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:govashïfjïfjïf|govashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:govashïfshïfshïf|govashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:govashïfkïfkïf|govashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:govashïfthïf|govashïfthïf]] || [[word:govashïfjïf|govashïfjïf]] || [[word:govashïfshïf|govashïfshïf]] || [[word:govashïfkïf|govashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:govashïfthïf|govashïfthïf]] || [[word:govashïfjïf|govashïfjïf]] || [[word:govashïfshïf|govashïfshïf]] || [[word:govashïfkïf|govashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:govashæthæ|govashæthæ]] || [[word:govashæjæ|govashæjæ]] || [[word:govashæshæ|govashæshæ]] || [[word:govashækæ|govashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:govashathatha|govashathatha]] || [[word:govashajaja|govashajaja]] || [[word:govashashasha|govashashasha]] || [[word:govashakaka|govashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:govashatha|govashatha]] || [[word:govashaja|govashaja]] || [[word:govashasha|govashasha]] || [[word:govashaka|govashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:govashafthaf|govashafthaf]] || [[word:govashafjaf|govashafjaf]] || [[word:govashafshaf|govashafshaf]] || [[word:govashafkaf|govashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:govashasha|govashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:govashësha|govashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashrosha|govashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govashmusha|govashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:govashyasha|govashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovashnkshësha|gogovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovashnkrosha|gogovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovashnkmusha|gogovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovashnkyasha|gogovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:govavashasha|govavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govavashësha|govavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govavashrosha|govavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govavashmusha|govavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govavashyasha|govavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovavashnkshësha|gogovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovavashnkrosha|gogovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovavashnkmusha|gogovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovavashnkyasha|gogovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gevæshasha|gevæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gevæshësha|gevæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gevæshrosha|gevæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gevæshmusha|gevæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gevæshyasha|gevæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogevæshnkshësha|gogevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogevæshnkrosha|gogevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogevæshnkmusha|gogevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogevæshnkyasha|gogevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:govfashasha|govfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govfashësha|govfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govfashrosha|govfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govfashmusha|govfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govfashyasha|govfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovfashnkshësha|gogovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovfashnkrosha|gogovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovfashnkmusha|gogovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovfashnkyasha|gogovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
